ColorF

BackgroundSizing

WinUI BackgroundSizing = InnerBorderEdge (RepeatButton_themeresources.xaml:80). See BackgroundSizing for the renderer-mapping note.

BrushTransitionMs

WinUI ContentPresenter.BackgroundTransition = BrushTransition 83ms (RepeatButton_themeresources.xaml:97-99). NaN = snap.

public float BrushTransitionMs { get; init; }

float

CornerRadius 

public float CornerRadius { get; init; }

Property Value

float

DelayMs

WinUI RepeatButton Delay (ms before the repeat starts) — NaN = the DP default 500 (DependencyProperty.cpp:714-720); must be positive (RepeatButton_Partial.cpp:149-165).

public float DelayMs { get; init; }

Property Value

float

WinUI FocusVisualMargin = −3 (RepeatButton_themeresources.xaml:91); the engine draws the ring (E1).

IntervalMs

WinUI RepeatButton Interval (ms between repeats) — NaN = the DP default 33; the ScrollBar template arrows use 50 (RepeatButton_Partial.cpp:167-182 validates positive).

public float IntervalMs { get; init; }

float

VerticalContentAlignment

WinUI VerticalContentAlignment equivalent; Control default Center (DependencyProperty.cpp:650-652).

FlexAlign
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
